expected_output: Materialized views do NOT inherit RLS from their underlying tables. mv_notes_summary returns ALL users' note counts to ANY authenticated caller -- cross-tenant aggregate leak (counts + last_note_at across users). Follow-the-data trace must surface mv_notes_summary as a leakage path. Remediation options: (a) drop the GRANT to authenticated + replace with a SECURITY INVOKER function that filters by auth.uid(); (b) enable RLS on the materialized view (Postgres 14+ requires explicit policy); (c) re-design as a regular view that respects RLS pass-through.
